ew_context: Price breaking below critical support level suggesting wave 3 or C wave decline continuation
pattern_desc: Clean break below key support at 2148.38 with strong bearish momentum. Multiple failed bounces confirm distribution phase
key_levels: Support: 1939.53 (major low target). Resistance: 2148.38 (broken support), 2423.04 (swing high)
invalidation: Close above 2286.73 on D1 timeframe would negate the bearish breakdown
market_context: Crypto weakness continues amid regulatory concerns and risk-off sentiment. ETH underperforming broader market
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

ETH has broken decisively below the key level at 2148.38 with three touches confirming its significance as major support. The breakdown from recent highs at 2464.78, 2403.73, and 2423.04 shows clear distribution pattern. Current price at 2129.74 represents continuation of bearish momentum with target toward 1939.53 major low.

RSI at extremely oversold 26.2% suggests strong selling pressure, while EMA20 at 2232.55 below EMA50 at 2247.31 confirms bearish trend structure. High ATR of 69.17 reflects elevated volatility typical of crypto breakdown moves. Turbulent flow with Reynolds number of 103.55 indicates impulsive selling pressure.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 2148.38 (broken support now resistance), 2286.73 (stop loss level)
- **Support**: 1939.53 (major swing low target), 1853.05 (measured target)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 2286.73 on D1 timeframe would create failed breakdown and negate the bearish thesis.

## Macro & Flow Context

Crypto sector remains under pressure with regulatory uncertainty and risk-off flows. Turbulent CFD physics with momentum alignment confirms institutional selling pressure continues.
